title: GET /api/v1/accounts/:id/statuses
description: Implement the account statuses timeline endpoint. Returns paginated list of posts by the given account. Supports max_id, since_id, min_id, limit query params. For local accounts returns posts table. For remote accounts returns remote_posts table. Excludes replies by default (exclude_replies param). Excludes boosts by default (exclude_reblogs param).
design: Sort by snowflake ID descending. Paginate: WHERE id < max_id (exclusive). Link header: next points to oldest ID in result, prev points to newest. Status serialization must include all required fields including application, media_attachments as array.
acceptance_criteria: Timeline returns posts in reverse chronological order; pagination via Link header works; exclude_replies param filters out replies; limit param is respected (max 40); authenticated user sees DMs addressed to them
